productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Delma Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue denim skorts made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with washed look, one insert pocket on the left side, two patch pockets on the back with stitch detailing, one insert pocket on the front flap with zippered compartment inside it, floral printed fabric belt and floral printed band on the inseam of the waistbandFittingRegular Waist - 22-24 inches Wash care Machine wash Cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detachable accessories Get ready to indulge your little girl in happy feelings with these blue denim skorts from gini and jony. Team this with white or pink tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
